description_long: This is a classic composition notebook with a black and white marbled cover and a black textured spine. The front cover features a large white label area bordered in black, with printed text in the center. The book is rectangular, with a thickness typical of a standard notebook, and the edges of the pages are visible from the side. The cover material appears to be a semi-glossy, durable cardboard, while the spine is reinforced and textured for grip. The pages inside are likely white, wide-ruled paper, as is common for this type of notebook. The overall appearance is utilitarian and designed for everyday writing or note-taking.
description: A black and white marbled composition notebook with a black spine and a white label area on the front cover. The book is rectangular, moderately thick, and has a classic utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the marbled cover, black spine, and a large white label area with printed text.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the book's thickness and the layered appearance of the pages.
description_view_2: Back view highlighting the marbled pattern and the black spine, with no label visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the book's thickness and the edge of the black spine.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is solid black with a textured appearance and no visible text or decorative elements. It is vertically oriented and contrasts with the marbled cover.
